---
title: "Replace YAML"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("diffobj", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("diffobj")
}
library(diffobj)

replaceYamlHeader <- function(fileName, author = "D. S. Koster", date = "2024-09-06", doWrite = FALSE) {
  lines <- readLines(fileName, warn = FALSE)
  
  # Find the first level-1 heading, safely
  h1Indices <- which(grepl("^# ", lines))
  if (length(h1Indices) == 0) {
    message(sprintf("No level-1 heading found in %s; skipping.", fileName))
    return(NULL)
  }
  firstH1Index <- h1Indices[1]
  
  # Extract label from file name
  label <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(fileName))
  
  # Build new YAML + HTML header
  yamlHeader <- c(
    "---",
    sprintf('title: "%s - (000) Template Code 2026"', label),
    sprintf('author: "%s"', author),
    sprintf('date: "%s"', date),
    "output:",
    "   html_document:",
    "    theme: null",
    "    css: ../HTML/adfg-style.css",
    "    include:",
    "      before_body: ../HTML/header.html",
    "      after_body: ../HTML/footer.html",
    "---",
    '<div class="title-container">',
    '  <img class="title-logo" src="../HTML/adfg_logo.png" alt="ADFG Logo"/>',
    sprintf('  <div class="title">%s - (000) Template Code 2026</div>', label),
    '</div>',
    "" # blank line for separation
  )
  
  # Use seq() to avoid warnings regardless of values
  contentLines <- lines[seq(from = firstH1Index, to = length(lines))]
  
  # Combine new header with the remainder of the file
  newLines <- c(
    yamlHeader,
    contentLines
  )
  
  # Show diff for dry run
  cat(sprintf("\n====== Preview diff for: %s ======\n", basename(fileName)))
  diff <- diffobj::diffChr(lines, newLines, format = "raw")
  print(diff)  
  
  if (doWrite) {
    # Optionally: file.copy(fileName, paste0(fileName, ".bak"))
    writeLines(newLines, fileName)
    message(sprintf("Header replaced in %s", fileName))
  } else {
    message(sprintf("No changes written to %s (dry run only)", fileName))
  }
}

# ---- Batch process all .Rmd files (dry run) ----
rmdFolder <- "C:/Users/jmcoleman2/Documents/GitHub/Template-code-2026/R-Code"
rmdFiles <- list.files(rmdFolder, pattern = "\\.Rmd$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
lapply(rmdFiles, replaceYamlHeader, author = "Author Name", date = "Date", doWrite = TRUE)
```
